name: shpool-alt
pre: mkdir -p /tmp/shpool-spec-test && (env XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/shpool-spec-test nohup /home/jerry/.cargo/bin/shpool --config-file /home/jerry/Tools/detachable-shell/shpool/config.toml daemon > /tmp/shpool-spec-test/daemon.log 2>&1 & echo $! > /tmp/shpool-spec-test/daemon.pid); sleep 2
post: if [ -f /tmp/shpool-spec-test/daemon.pid ]; then kill "$(cat /tmp/shpool-spec-test/daemon.pid)" 2>/dev/null; fi; sleep 1; rm -rf /tmp/shpool-spec-test; true
